category_sources: source_facts.description says DVC is Git for data science projects; official DVC docs describe data/model versioning and ML pipelines.
display_name_sources: Official DVC documentation and GitHub README use the display name DVC / Data Version Control.
docs_sources: Official DVC documentation is served from doc.dvc.org, redirected from dvc.org/doc.
repo_sources: Official DVC docs link to the treeverse/dvc GitHub repository as the DVC project repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies the data-science Git role; official DVC docs cover data pipelines, experiment tracking, and data/model versioning.
